name: task-completed-quality-gate
summary: Enforce lint + typecheck + (optional) test before allowing Stop. Like stop-until-tests-pass but broader.
when_to_use: Repos with both linter and type-checker; want a single enforcement point before turn completion.
script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
F=()
if [ -f package.json ]; then
  LINT=$(jq -r '.scripts.lint // ""' package.json)
  if [ -n "$LINT" ] && [ "$LINT" != null ]; then
    R=$(timeout 60 npm run -s lint 2>&1 || true)
    echo "$R" | grep -qiE 'error|fail' && F+=("lint: $(echo \"$R\" | tail -5)")
  fi
  TC=$(jq -r '.scripts.typecheck // .scripts["type-check"] // ""' package.json)
  if [ -n "$TC" ] && [ "$TC" != null ]; then
    R=$(timeout 60 npm run -s typecheck 2>&1 || true)
    echo "$R" | grep -qiE 'error' && F+=("typecheck: $(echo \"$R\" | tail -5)")
  fi
fi
if [ ${#F[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
  S=$(printf '%s\n' "${F[@]}")
  jq -n --arg s "$S" '{"decision":"block","reason":("Quality gate failed:\n"+$s)}'
  exit 0
fi
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
verify: Introduce a lint or type error; Stop gets blocked.
